_note: Blank schema for the creator's personal rate actuals: what real closed deals actually paid, per format. Real data lives in pipeline/user-context/rate-card.local.json (gitignored; git pull never touches it). Rows are written by the human only; deal-debrief PROPOSES a row from each closed deal (with the effective hourly computed offline by tools/finance.py from cost actuals when available) and the human saves or discards it, mirroring the playbook-bootstrap discipline. rate-card-fill reads this file FIRST as the personal_rate source, before benchmark ranges (shared/finance-engine.md pricing standardization).

rates.format: dedicated-video | integrated-segment | shorts | bundle | usage-rights-addon | exclusivity-addon
